crossRefs.label: Replace the transfer L. side case oil seal.
Replace the intermediate shaft oil seal.

blocks.text: Transfer inspection
1. Lift Up
2. No. 1 propeller shaft and transfer disconnect
No. 1 Propeller Mark (C) the connection between the shaft (A) and the transfer (B). Disconnect the No. 1 propeller shaft from the transfer.
3. Transfer gear backlash Check

Set the select lever to the N position. Set the dial gauge (B) on the companion flange (A). Measure transfer gear backlash. Standard value: 0.06-0.16mm If backlash is out of standard, replace the transfer.
4. Transfer fluid leak Check
Inspect for fluid leaks throughout the transfer.

items.text: If there is a fluid leak on the mating surface of the transfer and torque converter case, Remove transfer and O-ring , , Replace the transfer L. side case oil seal.

refs.label: Replace the transfer L. side case oil seal.

items.text: If there is a fluid leak on the mating surface of the transfer and torque converter case, Remove transfer and O-ring , , Replace the transfer L. side case oil seal.

refs.label: Replace the transfer L. side case oil seal.

items.text: If there is a fluid leak on the mating surface of the transfer and intermediate shafts, Transfer removed , , Transfer R. Side case oil seal , , Replace the intermediate shaft oil seal.

refs.label: Transfer R. Side case oil seal
Replace the intermediate shaft oil seal.

items.text: If there is a fluid leak on the mating surface of the transfer and intermediate shafts, Transfer removed , , Transfer R. Side case oil seal , , Replace the intermediate shaft oil seal.

refs.label: Transfer R. Side case oil seal
Replace the intermediate shaft oil seal.

items.text: If there is fluid leakage at the companion flange, Transfer removed , , Replace transfer case oil seal and O-ring.

refs.label: Replace transfer case oil seal and O-ring.

items.text: If there is fluid leakage at the companion flange, Transfer removed , , Replace transfer case oil seal and O-ring.

refs.label: Replace transfer case oil seal and O-ring.

items.text: If there is a fluid leak on the mating surface of the transfer L. side case and transfer R. side case, Transfer removed Remove old sealant from transfer case and reapply sealant.
If there is a fluid leak on the mating surface of the transfer L. side case and transfer R. side case, Transfer removed Remove old sealant from transfer case and reapply sealant.

blocks.text: 5. Transfer removal
6. Transfer overall starting torque Check
Fix the transfer case (A) with vise (B).

items: When fixing the transfer case to the vise, protect the case with a piece of wood (C) or similar to prevent damage to the case.

blocks.text: 7. Transfer gear tooth contact inspection

Remove the transfer L. side case (A), knock pin (B) and oil pipe (C). Remove the O-ring (D). Remove the transfer drive gear (E). Remove the transfer driven gear (F). Transfer hypoid Apply a thin, uniform coat of blue varnish to both tooth surfaces of the gear. Install transfer driven gear. Install the transfer drive gear. Install the knock pin and O-ring, and install the oil pipe. Install the transfer L. side case. Make one turn of the companion flange and one additional reverse turn. Remove the transfer L. side case. Remove the knock pin, oil pipe, and O-ring. Remove the transfer drive gear. Remove the transfer driven gear.
Inspect the condition of the transfer gear tooth contact. If the condition of the transfer gear tooth contact is not proper, replace the transfer.
8. Transfer drive gear, transfer driven gear Installation
Install transfer driven gear (A). Install the transfer drive gear (B).
9. Transfer L. Side Case Mounting
Apply sealant to the sealing surface of the transfer L. side case.

items: The sealant must be genuine Honda liquid packing 1216E.
Wipe off old sealant and remove dirt and oil from the sealing surface.
If the sealant is left for more than 4 minutes after application, do not assemble the product as it is. Re-apply the sealant.
Transfer fluid should be injected 30 minutes after assembly.

blocks.text: Install the knock pin (A) and new O-ring (B), and install the oil pipe (C). Install the transfer L. side case (D).
10. Transfer overall starting torque Check
Fix the transfer case (A) with vise (B).

items: When fixing the transfer case to the vise, protect the case with a piece of wood (C) or similar to prevent damage to the case.

blocks.text: 11. Transfer Mounting
12. Transfer gear backlash Check

Set the select lever to the N position. Set the dial gauge (B) on the companion flange (A). Measure transfer gear backlash. Standard value: 0.06-0.16mm If backlash is out of standard, replace the transfer.
13. No. 1 Propeller Shaft and Transfer Connection
Align the alignment marks (C) on the No. 1 propeller shaft (A) and transfer (B). Tighten four new 12-point bolts (D).
